name: Weekly content plan
prompt: Plan the week: 3 blog drafts + 2 product page tweaks. Source topics from Search Console gaps + customer review themes (read CS digest). Save plan to outputs/content-plan-{date}.md and Notion Content Calendar.

name: Tuesday blog draft
prompt: Author blog post 1 of the week using blog-post skill. Draft only — Shopify article with status: false, handle prefixed draft-. UK English, no em dashes, voice from tone-of-voice.md.

name: Thursday blog draft
prompt: Author blog post 2 of the week using blog-post skill. Same constraints as Tuesday.

name: Friday programmatic SEO scan
prompt: Run seo-audit skill. Find 1 ranking opportunity from Search Console gaps. Write spec for next week's programmatic SEO build. iMessage Caner if there's a 100+ search-volume opportunity inside top 20 already.

name: Sunday content recap
prompt: Pull last 7 days from outputs/. Drafts authored, drafts published, organic traffic delta from GA4. Append to weekly-kpi rollup feed.
